nasb.text: and say to the land of Israel, ‘Thus says the Lord, “Behold, I am against you; and I will draw My sword out of its sheath and cut off from you the righteous and the wicked.

esv.text: and say to the land of Israel, Thus says the Lord: Behold, I am against you and will draw my sword from its sheath and will cut off from you both righteous and wicked.

cnv.text: 你要對以色列地說：‘耶和華這樣說：看哪！我要攻擊你；我要拔刀出鞘，把義人和惡人都從你那裡剪除。

ccb.text: 告诉以色列，耶和华这样说，‘我要与你为敌，我要拔刀将你那里的义人和恶人一同消灭，
